scope.target: Retire legacy decision files and remove them as active entry points
scope.dependency_radius: Decision archive plus repo-level entry docs that previously referenced ADRs
constraints: Do not leave deleted decision files as live references in canonical docs
Keep .dev/adr/ only as a retired archive layer
Preserve standards/guides/.ai as the new canonical rule surface

inputs.architecture_target: Retire the old decision archive and route users to canonical docs instead
review_findings: Canonical docs should not retain ADR references
Visible ADR files are expected to be deleted

steps: Rewrote .dev/adr/README.md and INDEX.md as retirement/archive notes
Updated AGENTS, .dev entry docs, portable guides, and skill references to use standards/guides/architecture as canonical sources
Removed explicit ADR-number references from remaining canonical docs
validation: Searches for ADR-number references in canonical docs return no matches
The decision archive no longer contains active ADR files
Repo entry docs now point to standards/guides/architecture instead of ADRs
deferred_items: Optionally delete .dev/adr/ entirely in a future cleanup if no archive layer is desired
Optionally add a final workflow review report

results.summary: Retired the legacy ADR archive and re-pointed repo entry docs to canonical standards, guides, and architecture docs.
